title: classroom50/results/v1
description: Machine-readable schema for the per-repo <repo>/results.json file written by `gh teacher download` (cli/gh-teacher/download.go::refreshResultJSON) alongside each cloned student repo. It is the full submission history for ONE repo: a JSON array of submission envelopes, NEWEST FIRST. Each envelope pairs a submit-tag with that submission's result.json payload. Distinct from <repo>/result.json (which is just the single latest payload) and from <classroom>/scores.json (the aggregated, owner-keyed gradebook). NOTE: unlike a scores.json submission record (a result/v1 payload MINUS `assignment`), the `result` here is the RAW result/v1 payload as published on the release — it still carries `assignment`. `result` is null when a submit-tag release carried no result.json asset. This artifact carries no top-level `schema` sentinel (it is a bare array); the file name is the contract.

submission_tag.description: The submit/<UTC-timestamp>-<short-sha> release tag this envelope's result graded.

result.description: The raw result/v1 payload published on the release, or null when the release had no result.json asset. The download tool round-trips the bytes verbatim; the shape mirrors result-v1.schema.json (which still carries `assignment`).

resultPayload.description: A result/v1 payload as published on the release (mirrors result-v1.schema.json — kept loose here because results.json round-trips the bytes verbatim and does not re-validate them). The required set matches result/v1.
